Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWLOCALCOBRANCA', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &PesCod = &Context.PesCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &CbrTipImp1 = nullvalue(&CbrTipImp1) &CbrSts1 = nullvalue(&CbrSts1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &CbrTipImp2 = nullvalue(&CbrTipImp2) &CbrSts2 = nullvalue(&CbrSts2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &CbrTipImp3 = nullvalue(&CbrTipImp3) &CbrSts3 = nullvalue(&CbrSts3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Cadastro de Local de Cobrança' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterLike") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterContains") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRCTABANBANCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterLike") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterContains") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(3, "Contém") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterLike") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterContains") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRCTABANBANCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterLike") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterContains") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(3, "Contém") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterLike") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterContains") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRCTABANBANCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterLike") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterContains") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(3, "Contém") EndCase EndIf EndIf Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount CbrSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = LocalCobranca.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, CbrCod) &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = LocalCobranca.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, CbrCod) &add.Clear() &add.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &add.AddItem(1, 'Log.Alteração') If ((CbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' Or CbrCtaBanBanCod = '077' Or CbrCtaBanBanCod = '133') and &Context.Old_Perfil = 3) &add.AddItem(2, 'Testar Autenticação') Endif If (CbrCtaBanBanCod = '077' And &Context.Old_Perfil = 3 ) &add.AddItem(3, 'Gerar Webhook Inter') Endif If (CbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' And &Context.Old_Perfil = 3 ) &add.AddItem(4, 'Gerar Webhook Sicredi') Endif If ((CbrCtaBanBanCod = '748') and &Context.Old_Perfil = 3) &add.AddItem(5, 'Testar Autenticação pix Sicredi') Endif Do Case Case CbrSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO CbrSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case CbrSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO CbrSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise CbrSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator1.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &add.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &add = 1 Do 'Do LogAlteracao' Case &add = 2 Do 'Do TestaAutenticacao' Case &add = 3 Do 'Do GerarWebhook_Inter' Case &add = 4 Do 'Do GerarWebhookSicredi' Case &add = 5 Do 'Do TestaAutenticacaoPixSi' EndCase &add = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event LogAlteracao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wwLogRegistrosIndividual.Create(&LogErpRegKey, 'LOCALCOBRANCA') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GerarWebhook_Inter_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcGeraWebhook_Inter.Create(EmpCod, CbrCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GerarWebhook_Inter_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GerarWebhookSicredi_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcGeraWebhook_Sicredi.Create(EmpCod, CbrCod, CbrNroCon, CbrCtaBanAgeCod, CbrCtaBanAgeDig) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GerarWebhookSicredi_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LocalCobranca.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(CbrCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CbrNom1.Visible = False &CbrCtaBanCod1.Visible = False &CbrCtaBanBanCod1.Visible = False &CbrTipImp1.Visible = False &CbrSts1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRNOM' &CbrNom1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRCTABANCOD' &CbrCtaBanCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRCTABANBANCOD' &CbrCtaBanBanCod1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRTIPIMP' &CbrTipImp1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRSTS' &CbrSts1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CbrNom2.Visible = False &CbrCtaBanCod2.Visible = False &CbrCtaBanBanCod2.Visible = False &CbrTipImp2.Visible = False &CbrSts2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRNOM' &CbrNom2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRCTABANCOD' &CbrCtaBanCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRCTABANBANCOD' &CbrCtaBanBanCod2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRTIPIMP' &CbrTipImp2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRSTS' &CbrSts2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CbrNom3.Visible = False &CbrCtaBanCod3.Visible = False &CbrCtaBanBanCod3.Visible = False &CbrTipImp3.Visible = False &CbrSts3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRNOM' &CbrNom3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRCTABANCOD' &CbrCtaBanCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRCTABANBANCOD' &CbrCtaBanBanCod3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRTIPIMP' &CbrTipImp3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRSTS' &CbrSts3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 0 &CbrNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 0 &CbrNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LogAlteracao' &LogErpRegKey = trim(str(CbrCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LogAlteracao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do TestaAutenticacao' Do Case Case CbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' //Sicredi /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TesteAutenticacao.Call(EmpCod, CbrCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Case CbrCtaBanBanCod = '077' prcOAuth_Inter.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &Context.PesCod, CbrCod, &AuxCbrChaTra, &Mensagem) If &Mensagem.IsEmpty() msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Autenticação realizada com sucesso.", DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) Else msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", &Mensagem, DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf Case CbrCtaBanBanCod = '133' OAuth_Cresol.Call(&Context.EmpCod, CbrCod, &Context.PesCod, &AuxCbrChaTra, &Mensagem) If &Mensagem.IsEmpty() msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Autenticação realizada com sucesso.", DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) Else msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", &Mensagem, DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf EndCase EndSub Sub 'Do GerarWebhook_Inter' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GerarWebhook_Inter_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do GerarWebhookSicredi' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GerarWebhookSicredi_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do TestaAutenticacaoPixSi' if CbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' and CbrCtaBanPixApi <> 'N' prcOAuth_SicrediPIX.Call(EmpCod, &PesCod, CbrCod, &CbrChaTra, &Mensagem) &Execute = IIf(CbrCtaBanPixApi = 'P', 'https://api-pix.sicredi.com.br/api/v2/cob', 'https://api-pix-h.sicredi.com.br/api/v2/cob') msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!", &Mensagem ,DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CBRCOD" &CbrCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CbrNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRCTABANCOD' &CbrCtaBanCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRCTABANBANCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CbrCtaBanBanCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRTIPIMP' &CbrTipImp1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRSTS' &CbrSts1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CBRCOD", "", not &CbrCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CbrCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRNOM' AND not &CbrNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrNom1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRCTABANCOD' AND not &CbrCtaBanCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrCtaBanCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRCTABANBANCOD' AND not &CbrCtaBanBanCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrCtaBanBanCod1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRTIPIMP' AND not &CbrTipImp1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrTipImp1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CBRSTS' AND not &CbrSts1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrSts1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRNOM' AND not &CbrNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrNom2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRCTABANCOD' AND not &CbrCtaBanCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrCtaBanCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRCTABANBANCOD' AND not &CbrCtaBanBanCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrCtaBanBanCod2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRTIPIMP' AND not &CbrTipImp2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrTipImp2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CBRSTS' AND not &CbrSts2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrSts2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRNOM' AND not &CbrNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrNom3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRCTABANCOD' AND not &CbrCtaBanCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrCtaBanCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRCTABANBANCOD' AND not &CbrCtaBanBanCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrCtaBanBanCod3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRTIPIMP' AND not &CbrTipImp3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrTipImp3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CBRSTS' AND not &CbrSts3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CbrSts3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"LocalCobranca" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
